rationale: set_status.py already applies this exact shape 3x in cmd_set_status (not-found check, --cascade guard, cascade-failure); Option A (parser.error) is foreign to this file, requires threading parser into the function signature, and would introduce a mismatched exit code (2 vs this function's existing 1).
rule: Option B — validate --reason-on-done/cancelled in the handler body with return 1 + stderr, no SystemExit
alternatives_rejected: Option A: parser.error(...) SystemExit(2) — real pattern elsewhere in the codebase but structurally foreign to set_status.py's cmd_set_status, which doesn't receive the parser object
